title: Gowg #1463
definition:
Gog = "mountain"

 1) a Reubenite, son of Shemaiah
 2) the prophetic prince of Rosh, Meshech and Tubal, and Magog
nasbUsage:
Definition: Gog = "mountain"

 1) a Reubenite, son of Shemaiah
 2) the prophetic prince of Rosh, Meshech and Tubal, and Magog

    NASB:  the name of an Isr., also leader of a northern nation
